title: Better Pumpkin Overlay
description: Replace the pumpkin overlay/blur with a smoother, more transparent, and visually appealing overlay.
body:
# **Better Transparent Pumpkin Overlay**
Enhance your Minecraft experience with a cleaner, more immersive view.

This resource pack replaces the default carved pumpkin overlay with a smoother, more transparent version. It maintains visual feedback so you still know you're wearing a pumpkin, but without the harsh blur blocking your view. Ideal for PvP, survival, or casual play, it offers a clear screen while preserving the vanilla feel.

---
![we got em like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a339408741729d838a64ca63af5b9c99457a2077.png)
**Features**

* Replaces the default carved pumpkin blur with a smoother and more transparent overlay
* Allows better visibility without completely removing the overlay
* Works with vanilla Minecraft – no OptiFine required
* Great for exploration, combat, and general gameplay
* Lightweight and doesn't affect other textures

---
![with no](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57a94d82eefc720d3b13fc5012e41f1faaa419b2.png)
**Installation**

1. Download the resource pack
2. Move the file into your Minecraft `resourcepacks` folder
3. Launch Minecraft and enable the pack via Options > Resource Packs

---

**Compatibility Note**
You may see a message stating that the pack was made for a different version of Minecraft. This is just a version warning and does not affect functionality.
